text: These two environments evoke in me a sense of curiosity—one is minimal, quiet, and expectant, while the other bursts with creative energy and thought provoking ideas. In the lounge-like room, the emptiness urges self-reflection and wonder about purpose and connection. The colorful exhibit, filled with words and moving images, inspires contemplation about progress, knowledge, and our evolving relationship with technology. There is an interplay between silence and discourse, each inviting a different kind of philosophical engagement. I feel poised between introspection and intellectual excitement.
